function solve(grid: number[][], x: number, y: number, k: number): number[][] {

    // Create a copy of the grid

    const newGrid = grid.map(row => [...row]);

    // Collect the submatrix rows

    const subRows: number[][] = [];

    for (let i = 0; i < k; i++) {

        const row = newGrid[x + i];

        const subRow = row.slice(y, y + k);

        subRows.push(subRow);

    }

    // Reverse the subRows

    subRows.reverse();

    // Replace the submatrix rows in newGrid

    for (let i = 0; i < k; i++) {

        const row = newGrid[x + i];

        const subRow = subRows[i];

        for (let j = 0; j < k; j++) {

            row[y + j] = subRow[j];

        }

    }

    return newGrid;

}
